name: @vanillagreen/pi-hooks
description_en: First-class Pi port of the vstack safety hooks: bare-cd blocking, pre-commit fmt+clippy, post-edit clippy, end-of-turn lint. Per-hook toggles via pi-extension-manager.
description_zh: vstack 安全钩子的第一类 Pi 端口：裸 cd 阻止、pre-commit fmt+clippy、post-edit clippy、end-of-turn lint。通过 pi-extension-manager 提供每个钩子的切换
